sections.paragraph:
πυρκαϊά, ᾶς, ἡ (Hom. et al.; Trag., Hdt., Aristot.) funeral pyre MPol 13:2 v.l. (for πυρά).—DELG s.v. καίω 10; πύρ.

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Trag.

Trag. = writer (s) of tragedy

trag. = tragedy, writer (s) of tragedy

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

Aristot Aristot , various works, IV b.c.—List 5

MPol MPol = Martyrdom of Polycarp; after II a.d.—List 1

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 899
